summary: Successfully deployed Weylus on the NixOS host 'nixos-nvme' to enable the Huawei MatePad Pro (HarmonyOS 2.0) as a touch-input graphic tablet. The switch built and activated correctly. Tablet background optimization profiles (GmsCore, KDE Connect, Syncthing-Fork) were successfully documented and guided.
goals: Enable KDE Connect and Syncthing background stability
Configure Weylus secondary display and touch input on NixOS
